title: SUITE_CONTROL_PLANE_0_4_7_MARKETING_DISPATCH_2026-06-02.md
text:
# Suite Control Plane 0.4.7 - Marketing Journey Dispatch

Data: 2026-06-02

## Obiettivo
Chiudere il residuo `marketing_journey_dispatch 404/not_queued` emerso nei sync Render Suite.

## Diagnosi
Il plugin WordPress Suite inviava correttamente:

`POST /api/suite/marketing/journeys/dispatch`

Il Suite Control Plane Render non aveva ancora la route registrata, quindi rispondeva `404`. WordPress interpretava la risposta come:

- `ok: false`
- `status: not_queued`
- `status_code: 404`

Il ricercatore/analista Codex ha confermato la diagnosi in read-only.

## Fix
Repo deploy:

`/Users/cristiancardarello/skinharmony-ai-backend`

Commit:

`a2701a1 Add Suite marketing journey dispatch receiver`

File modificati:

- `services/suite-control-plane/src/app.js`
- `services/suite-control-plane/test/suite-control-plane-smoke.js`

Versione servizio:

`0.4.7-marketing-journey-dispatch`

Route aggiunta:

`POST /api/suite/marketing/journeys/dispatch`

Comportamento:

- accetta solo con runtime key Render
- salva dispatch tenant-scoped nella coda dispatch esistente
- `execution_allowed: false`
- `state: queued_for_marketing_pull`
- `no_auto_send: true`
- `no_ads_launch: true`
- `owner_confirmation_required: true`
- `raw_customer_records_stored: false`
- `personal_data_payload: false`

## Core Gate
Gate update:

- esito: `ALLOWED`
- rischio: `low`

Gate deploy:

- esito: `ALLOWED`
- rischio: `low`

Gate sync verifica:

- esito: `REVIEW_REQUIRED`
- owner confirmation richiesta: `true`
- conferma owner ricevuta: `confermo sync verifica marketing journey`

## Test
Locale:

- `node services/suite-control-plane/test/suite-control-plane-smoke.js`
- esito: `Suite Control Plane smoke OK`

Live Render:

- `/health`: OK
- version: `0.4.7-marketing-journey-dispatch`
- route marketing senza chiave: `401`, quindi route registrata e protetta

## Verifica E2E WordPress -> Render
Report:

`/Users/cristiancardarello/skinharmony-ai-backend/reports/wordpress/suite_render_sync_5_3_19_marketing_verify_latest.json`

Esito:

- ok: `true`
- version: `5.3.19`
- marketing_journey_dispatch.ok: `true`
- marketing_journey_dispatch.status: `queued_for_marketing_pull`
- marketing_journey_dispatch.status_code: `200`
- dispatch_id: `marketing_dispatch_b32fc051-e2be-4209-8611-67784b9ee5ab`
- journeys_count: `4`
- approval_queue_count: `3`

Sync completo:

- heartbeat: OK
- snapshot: OK
- commerce snapshot: OK
- evidence push: `5/5`
- remote dashboard: OK

Conteggi Render dopo verifica:

- heartbeat_count: `16`
- snapshot_count: `16`
- commerce_snapshot_count: `9`
- evidence_count: `61`
- latest_plugin_version: `5.3.19`

## Stato finale
Il residuo `marketing_journey_dispatch 404/not_queued` e chiuso.

Ora il sync Render Suite accoda la coda marketing in modalita governata/read-only. Nessun messaggio, campagna, Ads o azione marketing viene eseguita automaticamente.
